title: Complete archive index integrity verification

sources.reason: Current archive index validation and legacy compatibility boundary.
Existing archive integrity regression coverage and gaps.

riskAssessment.reason: The checker must reject missing or duplicated index coverage without rewriting historical archive evidence.

executionDecision.reason: The review identified a concrete reverse-coverage gap while preserving the existing legacy boundary.

preReviewWarnings: Review that every authoritative archive pair is indexed and that strict rows cannot reuse paths, Work Item IDs, or sequences.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Archive Integrity reports an error when an authoritative Contract/Summary pair is absent from the index.
Strict archive rows reject duplicate Contract paths, Summary paths, Work Item IDs, and archive sequences while preserving the documented legacy boundary.
Strict archive row hashes and Work Item IDs continue to be checked against the authoritative files.
Regression tests cover missing reverse coverage and duplicate identity cases.
The governance reference documents the strict-row checks and the preserved legacy boundary.
guidelines: Keep archive evidence append-only; this Work Item may change validation but must not rewrite historical records.
Preserve legacy archive readability while applying strict integrity checks to new archive rows.
Generated status and archive index files must be produced by repository commands, not hand-edited.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: authoritative archive pair missing from index
evidence: Regression test constructs an authoritative Contract/Summary pair omitted from the index and expects a coverage error.
Regression tests cover duplicate strict paths, Work Item IDs, and archive sequences.
Existing legacy index rows remain readable while new rows retain strict hash and identity checks.

intent.problem: The archive index stores hashes and identity metadata, but current validation does not prove that every authoritative archive pair is covered by the index.
constraints: Do not rewrite or delete historical archive evidence.
Do not broaden this Work Item into PR ownership or release workflow changes.
intent.rationale: Close the remaining Archive Integrity gap at the evidence consumer so missing coverage and duplicate strict identities fail closed.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User confirmed the ordered remediation loop and this Work Item plan.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
